pi_items.source: File system inspection; Windows path cannot be verified from Linux
Task description: 'Update the Process Flow (Design Flow) to 5.0 GPM'; Current INP file shows PROCESS-FLOW = 0.325681 (expected to be changed by task)
Task description says '07:00 - 09:00' (3 hours); Verifier checks vals[6:9] which is indices for hours [7,8,9]; metadata only lists [7,8]
Task description says '17:00 - 19:00' (3 hours); Verifier checks vals[16:19] which is indices for hours [17,18,19]; metadata only lists [17,18]
Task description: 'All other hours: 10% (0.1)'; Matches metadata value exactly

privileged_info_summary: This task operates on a synthetic 4StoreyBuilding.inp eQUEST/DOE-2 energy simulation project file. The expected outcome is to configure a Domestic Hot Water (DHW) schedule with weekday morning peak (hours 7-9) and evening peak (hours 17-19) at 100% usage, base load of 10%, and set the DHW Loop process flow to 5.0 GPM. The current file has a DHW circulation loop with PROCESS-FLOW = 0.325681 GPM and process schedule 'Undgnd Occ Sch'. eQUEST is a real, publicly available energy modeling software that runs DOE-2 simulations.
